pdg_node.statement: (free_means: dict[str, np.ndarray], free_sds: dict[str, np.ndarray], n_draws: int) -> dict[str, np.ndarray]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Generate independent Gaussian draws for each latent parameter in unconstrained space, using parameter-wise mean/scale and preserving each parameter's original shape under a leading draw axis.

declaration.docstring: Generate independent Gaussian draws for each latent parameter in unconstrained space, using parameter-wise mean/scale and preserving each parameter's original shape under a leading draw axis.
